reason: Remediation involves deleting local user accounts. While technically simple, an incorrect deletion could remove required administrative or service accounts, leading to loss of SSH/console access or service failure. Human verification of each account against the authorized list is required to avoid lockout.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential removal of essential admin or service accounts; Loss of remote access (SSH) if only privileged account is deleted; Impact on applications that rely on specific local users
